zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny於1221年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿斯頓 坎特洛福時，他的父親William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo37歲，母親Millicent Gournay32歲。他於大約1241年與Eva de Braose在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年9月25日在英國維爾爾卡爾斯同 維林頓享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾霍頓 姆 斯圖德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny于1221年出生在英国瓦維其可爾阿斯頓 坎特洛福时，他的父亲William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo37岁，母亲Millicent Gournay32岁。他于大约1241年与Eva de Braose在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1254年9月25日在英国維爾爾卡爾斯同 維林頓享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾霍頓 姆 斯圖德利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny was born in 1221, in Aston Cantlow, Warwickshire, England, his father, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, was 37 and his mother, Millicent Gournay, was 32. He married Eva de Braose about 1241, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 September 1254, in Calstone Wellington, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny est né en 1221, à Aston Cantlow, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Millicent Gournay, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Eva de Braose environ 1241, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1254, à Calstone Wellington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Horton-cum-Studley, Cherwell, Oxfordshir: Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny 1221 in Aston Cantlow, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo 37 und seine Mutter Millicent Gournay 32. Er hat um 1241 in England Eva de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. September 1254 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Calstone Wellington, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Eva de Braose circa 1241, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 settembre 1254, nel Calstone Wellington, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavennyが1221年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストン カントロウで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloは37歳，母Millicent Gournayは32歳であった。約1241年にイギリスでEva de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年9月25日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルストーン ウエリントンで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホールトン クウム ストゥドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Horton-cum-Studley, Cherwell, Oxfordshir: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 호르턴 쿠 스투들리
ko.lifeSummary: William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny(이)가 1221년 영국 워윅실르 애스턴 캔틀로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Millicent Gournay(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1241년 영국에서 Eva de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 9월 25일 영국 윌츠히르 캘스톤 웰잉턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 호르턴 쿠 스투들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny nasceu em 1221, em Aston Cantlow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Millicent Gournay, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva de Braose aproximadamente 1241, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1254, em Calstone Wellington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Horton-cum-Studley, Cherwell, Oxfordshir: хауртон кум студли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny родился в 1221 г. в местности астон кантлоу, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent Gournay, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva de Braose около 1241 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 сентября 1254 г. в местности калстоун веллингтон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности хауртон кум студли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Eva de Braose aproximadamente 1241, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1254, en Calstone Wellington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
